issues.title: Only Atmospheric Shaders is officially supported
symptoms: OFSC-specific cloud integration does not apply when another shader pack is selected.
Visual issues may appear while the base shader pack still loads.
workarounds: Use Atmospheric Shaders for the officially supported shader workflow.
Treat other shader packs as unsupported and do not report their visual differences as OFSC support regressions.

issues.title: Distant Horizons support is experimental
symptoms: Clouds may disappear, ignore nearby terrain depth, or otherwise render incorrectly when Distant Horizons is present.
Shader-aware cloud rendering may conflict with the Distant Horizons cloud/depth pipeline.
workarounds: Disable Distant Horizons while troubleshooting OFSC rendering issues.
Re-test the setup without shaders or without Distant Horizons to isolate the conflict.
